name: feature.drawings.agents
description: Illustrator agent (ADR 0153 Phase 4). Turns a request into a vector illustration or diagram rendered in the EXISTING chat artifact workbench as safe SVG — composes the AI chat + the feature.drawings.nodes pack; no new chat surface. Pure-agent pack.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Illustrator
agents.description: Turns a request into a vector illustration or diagram rendered live in the artifact workbench. Uses openwop:feature.drawings.nodes.render.
